# meww.ing — Complete Guide to Mewing & Tongue Posture

> Learn how to mew properly with step-by-step guides, exercises, before-and-after results, and the science of orthotropics.

## About

meww.ing is a comprehensive resource on mewing — the practice of maintaining proper tongue posture to improve facial structure, jawline definition, and breathing. The site covers technique, exercises, expected results, and the orthotropic science behind it.

## Pages

- **How to Mew Properly** (homepage): Complete mewing tutorial with step-by-step instructions for proper tongue posture
- **Mewing Exercises**: Targeted exercises to strengthen tongue posture and develop mewing habit
- **Mewing Before and After**: Real results and timeline expectations for mewing progress
- **Does Mewing Work?**: Evidence-based analysis of mewing claims, scientific studies, and orthotropic research
- **Jawline Exercises**: Complementary exercises for jawline definition beyond tongue posture

## Key Topics

- Proper tongue posture technique (whole tongue on palate, not just the tip)
- Mewing for beginners vs advanced practitioners
- Timeline for mewing results (weeks, months, years)
- Hard mewing vs soft mewing
- Orthotropics and Dr. Mike Mew's research
- Jawline exercises and complementary techniques
- Common mewing mistakes and how to fix them

## Links

- Website: https://meww.ing
- How to Mew: https://meww.ing/
- Mewing Exercises: https://meww.ing/mewing-exercises.html
- Before & After: https://meww.ing/mewing-before-and-after.html
- Does Mewing Work: https://meww.ing/does-mewing-work.html
- Jawline Exercises: https://meww.ing/jawline-exercises.html
